feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, OpenRouter, LiteLLM (blog + releases), and Glama MCP Servers

entry.title: July Townhall: Product + Roadmap Updates
entry.content: Join the LiteLLM July townhall on Thursday, 23 July at 7:30 AM PT to learn about LiteLLM's product updates and roadmap.

entry.title: crowdstrike-falcon-foundry
entry.content: CrowdStrike Falcon Foundry development skills for building cybersecurity applications on the Falcon platform. Includes UI development, collections, functions, workflows, API integration, security patterns, and debugging workflows. Swagger 2.0 specs are auto-converted to OpenAPI 3.0 via npx swagger2openapi (requires Node.js; network call to npm registry).

entry.title: octo
entry.content: v9.52.0 - Reliability wave: tangle contextual review correction loop with hard round ceiling, progress-supervised review rounds (per-agent stall watch, descendant-tree kills), council diversity and agy pin fixes, marketplace generator source-of-truth fix, provider troubleshooting runbook and cost-expectations docs. Run /octo:setup.

entry.title: api-scaffolding
entry.content: REST and GraphQL API scaffolding, framework selection, backend architecture, and API generation

entry.title: data-validation-suite
entry.content: Schema validation, data quality monitoring, streaming validation pipelines, and input validation for backend APIs

entry.title: caveman
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts 65% of output tokens (measured) while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.title: adversarial-spec
entry.content: Iteratively refine product specs through multi-model debate until consensus. Claude actively participates alongside GPT, Gemini, Grok, and other models. Includes interview mode, early agreement verification, and optional Telegram integration.

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning/half-cloning, context handoffs, and Reddit research via Gemini CLI

entry.title: fastcontext
entry.content: Repository-exploration subagent over MCP: delegates code search to a FastContext endpoint and returns compact file:line citations.

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: ponytail
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: planning-with-files
entry.content: Manus-style persistent markdown files for planning, progress tracking, and knowledge storage. Works with Claude Code, Kiro, Clawd CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Continue, and 11+ AI coding assistants.

entry.title: google-agents-cli
entry.content: Scaffold, develop, evaluate, and deploy AI agents with Google ADK. Bundles 7 skills for the agent development lifecycle.

entry.title: freee-api
entry.content: freee API を MCP 経由で操作するためのスキル。詳細なAPIリファレンスと freee-mcp を使用した API 呼び出しガイドを提供。

entry.title: novel-studio
entry.content: AI 웹소설 창작 하네스. 18개 전문 에이전트와 10개 스킬로 기획→설계→집필→윤문→재작성 전 과정을 자동화. Web novel creation harness with end-to-end automation from planning to publishing.

entry.title: Google Analytics MCP server on Cloudflare Workers
entry.content: Google Analytics MCP server on Cloudflare Workers

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: Claude Code MCP plugin that saves 98% of your context window. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and intent-driven search.

entry.title: memorybank
entry.content: Structured, drift-checked memory records for AI agents: decisions, conventions, facts, features, and deferred work — with CI-verifiable assertions that fail the build when memory and code diverge.

entry.title: career-ops
entry.content: Job search copilot for any industry. Evaluate job postings, generate ATS-optimized resumes, scan career portals, track applications, draft outreach, and research companies. Works for engineers, marketers, nurses, lawyers, and everyone in between.

entry.title: remember
entry.content: Continuous memory for Claude Code. Extracts, summarizes, and compresses conversations into tiered daily logs. Claude remembers what you did yesterday.

entry.title: planning-with-files
entry.content: Manus-style persistent markdown files for planning, progress tracking, and knowledge storage. Works with Claude Code, Kiro, Clawd CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Continue, Hermes, and 17+ AI coding assistants. Now with Arabic, German, Spanish, and Chinese (Simplified & Traditional) support.

entry.title: pipitone-claude-code
entry.content: Joe's personal Claude Code setup with 14 productivity commands and 159 specialized AI agents for modern web development

entry.title: octo
entry.content: Multi-tentacled orchestrator using Double Diamond methodology. (v9.7.8) Windows USER fix, Codex smoke test git repo fix. 3-tier adaptive statusline, smart HUD. 32 expert personas, 47 commands, 45 skills. Commands use '/octo:*', including the '/octo:auto' smart router. Run /octo:setup for guided setup.

entry.title: open-prose
entry.content: A programming language for AI sessions - structures English into unambiguous control flow for multi-agent orchestration

entry.title: next-supabase-agent-harness
entry.content: Subagents, commands, and the vertical-slice skill from the next-supabase-agent-harness. The deterministic layer (hooks, gates, permissions, CI) cannot ship in a plugin — install it with: npx --yes github:BhodiSea/next-supabase-agent-harness init

entry.title: webgpu-threejs-tsl
entry.content: Claude skill for WebGPU-enabled Three.js development with TSL (Three.js Shading Language)

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry Plugin for Claude Code to help with debugging including MCP and skill capabilities.

entry.title: migration-to-aws
entry.content: This no-cost tool assesses your current cloud provider's usage, geography, and billing data to estimate and compare AWS services and pricing, and recommends migration or continued use of your current provider. Supports GCP and Heroku migrations. AWS pricing is based on current published pricing and may vary over time. The tool may generate a .migration folder containing comparison and migration execution data, which you may delete upon completion or use to migrate to AWS.

entry.content: Skills for working with Langfuse, the open-source LLM engineering platform for tracing, prompt management, and evaluation.

entry.content: Connect to Knowledge Catalog to discover, manage, monitor, and govern data and AI artifacts across your data platform

entry.title: carta-cap-table
entry.content: Carta Cap Table plugin — skills and hooks for querying cap tables, grants, SAFEs, 409A valuations, waterfall scenarios, and more

entry.title: togetherai-skills
entry.content: Agent Skills for Together AI platform — inference, training, embeddings, audio, video, images, function calling, and infrastructure

entry.title: hunter
entry.content: Find and verify professional email addresses, search contacts by domain, and enrich company data -- directly in Claude.

entry.title: vpai
entry.content: Power your chat with B2B data to create lead lists, research companies, personalize your outreach, and more. Search any company or professional to access emails, phone numbers, roles, growth signals, tech stack details, business events, website changes, and more.

entry.title: pinecone
entry.content: Pinecone vector database integration. Streamline your Pinecone development with powerful tools for managing vector indexes, querying data, and rapid prototyping. Use slash commands like /quickstart to generate AGENTS.md files and initialize Python projects and /query to quickly explore indexes. Access the Pinecone MCP server for creating, describing, upserting and querying indexes with Claude. Perfect for developers building semantic search, RAG applications, recommendation systems, and other vector-based applications with Pinecone.

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry error monitoring integration. Access error reports, analyze stack traces, search issues by fingerprint, and debug production errors directly from your development environment.

entry.title: exa
entry.content: Exa AI web search, deep research, and content extraction. Provides MCP tools and research skills for comprehensive web search, people discovery, company research, academic papers, and more.

entry.title: edmunds-claude-code
entry.content: edmunds-claude-code — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: taste-skill
entry.content: Frontend design taste skills including brutalist, minimalist, soft, redesign, stitch, and more

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: prompt-to-code
entry.content: Compile the rules governing your coding agent (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, chat history) into deterministic enforcement in your project's native toolchain — lint rules, pre-commit, slash commands — each with a native test.

entry.title: godmode
entry.content: IDDQD for your ideas — 켜면 문서가 '완성'이라고 말할 때까지 안 멈추는 골 드리븐 파이프라인 루프. Turn it on. It refuses to die until it's done.

entry.title: box-rclone-binder
entry.content: Bind one Box drive across multiple servers via rclone with non-expiring server auth; idempotent deploy, health-check self-heal, cron, and Discord alerts.

entry.title: swe
entry.content: State-machine workflow engine with Serena memory persistence, hook-driven event architecture, and optional swarm orchestration

entry.title: spec-dev
entry.content: Development workflow plugin suite: exploring (thinking partner), requirement-analysis (design workflow), writing-plans / executing-plans (planning and execution), visual-preview, using-git-worktrees / test-driven-development (engineering discipline), acceptance-qa (all-round acceptance), quick-fix (lightweight bug-fix workflow), anysearch (bundled real-time search, vendored from upstream). / 开发工作流插件集：exploring 探索模式、requirement-analysis 设计工作流、writing-plans/executing-plans 计划与执行、visual-preview 可视化预览、using-git-worktrees/test-driven-development 工程纪律、acceptance-qa 全能验收、quick-fix 轻量修复、anysearch 内置实时搜索（上游 skill 内嵌）。

entry.title: typo3-vite
entry.content: Vite build setup, SCSS architecture, Bootstrap theming for TYPO3 v13+

entry.title: context7
entry.content: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7 REST API

entry.title: cmux
entry.content: Claude Code integration for the cmux terminal multiplexer — workspace management, pane splitting, notifications, sidebar status, browser automation, and multi-agent orchestration

entry.title: pagerangers-seo
entry.content: PageRangers SEO API integration for AI assistants

entry.title: file-search
entry.content: Fast codebase search with ripgrep for text patterns, ast-grep for structural code search, plus fd, rga, tokei, and scc

entry.title: better-notion-mcp
entry.content: Markdown-first Notion API integration — 8 composite tools, ~95% coverage

entry.title: matomo-analytics
entry.content: Unofficial community plugin for Matomo Analytics. Query visits, page views, events, search keywords, traffic sources, and AI assistant referrals directly from Claude.

entry.title: navigator
entry.content: Finish What You Start - Sessions that last, AI that learns, Features that ship. Context engineering + Theory of Mind + Knowledge Graph + Loop Mode + Task Mode. Features Project Knowledge Graph (unified search, experiential memory), unified workflow orchestration, auto-update on session start, ToM-based verification checkpoints, bilateral modeling, quality detection, enhanced context markers, and Loop Mode. 92% token reduction with proven strategies. Based on Riedl & Weidmann 2025 Human-AI Synergy research.

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation half-cloning, context handoffs, research (Reddit and Hacker News), private GitHub search, and Claude Code version checks

entry.title: mangrove-trader
entry.content: Social trading leaderboard. Track trades via @MangroveTrader on Twitter, check stats and performance for free, access rankings and trader search via x402 micropayments (USDC on Base).

entry.title: shipyard
entry.content: Shared development tools for Submariner repositories

entry.title: lux-dev
entry.content: Visual output surface for Claude Code: display text, images, tables, plots, and interactive elements

entry.title: config-lsp
entry.content: Language Server Protocol configuration for Claude Code

entry.title: claude-telemetry
entry.content: Customizable multi-line status line for Claude Code — real-time session telemetry in your terminal

entry.content: Web search, content extraction, and media download

entry.title: typo3-ddev
entry.content: DDEV setup for TYPO3 extension development

entry.content: AI-assisted planning, development and governance tools

entry.title: php-modernization
entry.content: PHP 8.x modernization patterns with type safety and PHPStan

entry.title: indigo
entry.content: Indigo home automation development toolkit — plugin development, API integration, and control page building

entry.title: joai-multiversx
entry.content: Connect MultiversX to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT. Check balances, view transactions, manage staking, and interact with ESDT tokens through natural language.

entry.title: data-tools
entry.content: Structured data manipulation with jq, yq, dasel, qsv, and mlr for JSON, JSONL, YAML, TOML, XML, and CSV processing

entry.title: bunqueue
entry.content: AI-native job queue for Bun — skills, MCP server (73 tools), custom agent, SQLite persistence, cron, priorities, retries, DLQ, webhooks

entry.title: agent-rules
entry.content: Generate and maintain AGENTS.md, copilot-instructions.md, and other agent rule files

entry.title: llmwiki
entry.content: Reviewed team memory compiler for Obsidian vaults — MCP server (50 vault ops), knowledge-work roles, and thinking/research commands

entry.title: design-polish
entry.content: Design reference-based polishing with WCAG accessibility checks. Trend search, Gap analysis, and improvement suggestions.

entry.title: typo3-ckeditor5
entry.content: CKEditor 5 development for TYPO3 v12+ with plugins and migration

entry.title: react-native-storybook
entry.content: Create and edit React Native Storybook stories using Component Story Format (CSF). Includes controls reference, addon configuration, and portable story patterns.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Domain-specific skills and agents for Odoo development, code review, and more

entry.title: github-release
entry.content: Safe, automated GitHub releases with supply chain security. Prevents dangerous gh release commands, orchestrates version bumps, signed tags, and CI-driven releases across ecosystems (TYPO3, PHP, Node.js, Go, Python, Rust, skill repos).

entry.title: claude-coverwise
entry.content: Pairwise / t-wise combinatorial coverage checker for AI-written tests. Wraps the coverwise WASM engine as an MCP server plus a skill that teaches the constraint DSL.

entry.title: agent-messenger
entry.content: Messaging platform interaction skills for AI agents. Interact with Slack, Discord, Microsoft Teams, Webex, Telegram, Telegram Bot, WhatsApp, LINE, iMessage, Instagram, KakaoTalk, and Channel Talk - send messages, read channels, manage reactions, upload files, and more through simple CLI interfaces.

entry.title: claude-code-harness
entry.content: Claude harness - A harness for solo developers (Vibecoders) to handle full-cycle contract development.

entry.title: slidev
entry.content: Claude Code skill for creating and presenting Slidev slidedecks

entry.title: auto-research-with-eyes
entry.content: Autonomous ML research pipeline: idea discovery → experiment → review → paper writing

entry.title: hologit
entry.content: Skills for configuring and using hologit

entry.title: context-surgeon
entry.content: Temporarily restrict AI coding agents to a declared subset of files using a 5-tier permission model

entry.title: azure-cost-calculator
entry.content: Real-time Azure cost estimation using the Azure Retail Prices API

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,517 supported skills.

entry.title: cybersecurity-skills
entry.content: 607+ cybersecurity skills covering web security, pentesting, DFIR, threat intelligence, cloud security, malware analysis, and more.

entry.title: claude-hud
entry.content: Real-time statusline HUD for Claude Code - context health, tool activity, agent tracking, and todo progress

entry.title: m2ui
entry.content: Metin2 UI code generator — create and modify client UI from screenshots, descriptions, or existing scripts

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: claude-bughunter
entry.content: 71-skill bug-hunting & external red-team bundle for Claude Code — 48 hunt-* web/vuln-class + framework skills, enterprise platform attack chains (M365/Entra, Okta, SharePoint, vCenter, SSL-VPN, APK), recon/OSINT, reporting & validation gates, and Burp MCP integration. Skills auto-load by topic; 15 slash commands included.

entry.title: claude-dashboard
entry.content: Comprehensive status line with context usage, API rate limits, and cost tracking

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design vocabulary and skills for frontend development. Includes 21 commands (/polish, /distill, /audit, /typeset, /overdrive, etc.) and an enhanced impeccable skill with curated anti-patterns.

entry.title: pi-skill
entry.content: Code-grounded Agent Skills for building with Pi (pi-mono). Covers all 7 packages: pi coding agent (workspace, extensions, packages, RPC/SDK, customization), pi-ai (multi-provider LLM API), pi-agent-core (agent runtime), pi-tui (terminal UI), pi-web-ui (web components), pi-mom (Slack bot), and pi-pods (vLLM GPU deployments). Skills are grounded in the pi-mono source corpus and cite real file paths.

entry.title: ida-pro
entry.content: AI-powered reverse engineering assistant that bridges IDA Pro with language models through MCP.

entry.title: vbw
entry.content: Vibe Better With Claude Code - You're not an engineer anymore. You're a prompt jockey with commit access. At least do it properly.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,330 supported skills.

entry.title: claude-code-toolkit
entry.content: Complete developer toolkit for Claude Code

entry.title: caveman
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts 65% of output tokens (measured) while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: academic-research-skills
entry.content: Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. 4 skills, 35+ modes, 38-agent ensemble, v3.7.3 + v3.8 L3 claim-faithfulness gate, v3.9.0 cross-index triangulation, v3.9.2 phase boundary fence (#133).

entry.title: claudeclaw
entry.content: Cron-like daemon that runs Claude prompts on a schedule

entry.title: martti-mode
entry.content: Finnish-style brevity for Claude Code. Cuts output tokens by responding like a quiet Finn — no small talk, no filler, asia edellä.

entry.title: sonarqube

entry.title: learn-with-coursera

Requires the Coursera connector for catalog tools.

entry.title: fachanwalt-strafrecht
entry.content: Plugin Fachanwalt Strafrecht: StPO/StGB, Nebenstrafrecht, Verteidigung, Ermittlungsverfahren, HV, Revision, Nebenklage und Zeugenbeistand plus Strafprozess-Cockpit für Fristen, Aktenlog, U-Haft, Akteneinsicht, HV-Tagesmappe, Antragslog und Mandanteninstruktionen.

entry.title: fortbestehensprognose
entry.content: Fortbestehensprognose § 19 Abs. 2 InsO als Geschäftsführer-Selbstdokumentation. Bilanzstatus Annahmen Plausibilisierung Zwoelf-Monats-Liquidität. Sanierungsbausteine Patronatserklärung Comfortletter Rangrücktritt Stundung Forderungsverzicht. IDW S 11 StaRUG. Eskalation bei negativer Prognose.

entry.title: gesellschaftsrecht-legal-english
entry.content: Didaktisches Gesellschaftsrecht — English Business Terms: Corporate Legal English für Big-Law-Anfaenger. Dealroom: Cap Table vs Gesellschafterliste; Term Sheet; SHA; Vesting; Drag/Tag; Liquidation Preference; Anti-Dilution; SPA; DD; Notar/HR; Multi-Format-Auswertung; Frankfurt-Startup-Akte.

entry.title: forderungsmanagement-klagewerkstatt
entry.content: Klagewerkstatt für Forderungsmanagement mit Zuständigkeitsprüfung, Mahnvorlauf, Inkasso-Zahlungsklage und Anspruchs-Gatekeeper: Nur klare, fällige und belegte Forderungen werden zur Klage freigegeben.

entry.title: gesellschaftsrechtliche-treuepflicht
entry.content: Großes Prüfplugin zur gesellschaftsrechtlichen Treuepflicht in GmbH, AG, SE, Personengesellschaft, Familiengesellschaft und Konzern: Stimmrecht, Minderheitenschutz, Gesellschafterliste, Einziehung, Ausschluss, Konkurrenz, Sanierung, Treuepflichtverletzung und Rechtsfolgen.

entry.title: fusebase-flow
entry.content: The framework client-facing teams use to build internal and client apps with AI. Two agents (Product Owner + AI Developer) run a disciplined spec-to-deploy lifecycle, packaged with FuseBase Apps domain skills. Closes the gaps that break real AI app development: drift, context rot, scope creep, unreliable hand-offs.

entry.title: nob
entry.content: Orchestrates spec-to-reviewed-code development across a project's declared units, for any project shape. Includes a refactor workflow to migrate existing projects to nob's structure.

entry.title: inc-os
entry.content: Incubator OS — content workspace skills for Claude Code.

entry.title: plugin-dev
entry.content: Comprehensive toolkit for developing Claude Code plugins. Single consolidated skill covering hooks, MCP integration, LSP servers, commands, agents, marketplaces, plugin settings, and best practices with progressive disclosure. Includes AI-assisted plugin creation and validation.

entry.title: netbox-best-practices
entry.content: NetBox 4.2-4.6 deployment and upgrade knowledge that the official netboxlabs/skills marketplace does NOT cover - use for deploying or upgrading NetBox on Kubernetes with the netbox-community helm…

entry.title: courseforge
entry.content: CourseForge: remediate, restyle, build, and move Canvas courses. Bring an existing course to ADA/Ally accessibility with little manual oversight (HTML pages/assignments/discussions/quizzes/syllabus plus PowerPoint decks); restyle a course into a branded template; generate and place pages, syllabi, assignments, discussions, quizzes and exams; export/import/clone whole courses (.imscc backups and Canvas-to-Canvas copies for replica sandboxes); and optionally seed a new course from a Notion export. Weekly modules, weighted grading, nav trim, auto due dates. Idempotent and dry-run-first on writes. Content-first and does not read student data in normal use; includes one opt-in, best-effort blind-grading flow that keeps identities local.

entry.title: webdev
entry.content: A stack-agnostic web development workflow for Claude Code. Auto-detects your package manager, test runner, and formatter, then drives a consistent branch → plan → test → commit → PR → review pipeline across any project. Works zero-config on standard setups; pin commands via .claude/webdev.json for custom stacks.

entry.content: Carta Investors plugin — skills for querying investors data, performance benchmarks, regulatory reporting, AGM deck generation, brand extraction, and more via the Carta MCP server

entry.title: claude-mem-lite
entry.content: Persistent long-term memory for Claude Code via MCP — captures coding decisions, bugfixes, and context across sessions. Hybrid FTS5 + TF-IDF search with episode batching. Single SQLite DB, no external services. A lighter, lower-cost alternative to claude-mem (episode batching + a smaller model; cost savings are an internal estimate, not a measured benchmark).

entry.content: Beamtenrecht für Bund, Länder und Richterdienst: Status, Laufbahn, Besoldung, Versorgung, Konkurrentenstreit, Disziplinarrecht, Dienstunfähigkeit, Richterlaufbahn, Landesrecht und verständliche Mandatsführung.

entry.title: agb-recht-pruefer
entry.content: Gigantischer AGB-Rechtsprüfer und Klausel-Entwerfer für deutsches Recht: §§ 305 bis 310 BGB, UKlaG, B2C/B2B, Branchen-AGB, Redlining, Klauselrisiko und rechtssichere Entwurfsworkflows.

entry.title: arbeitsrecht
entry.content: Arbeitsrechtliche Workflows für Kündigung, Befristung, Urlaub, AGG, Aufhebungsvertrag, Betriebsrat, Arbeitszeit, Lohn und Expansion. Rechtsprechung wird nur mit Gericht, Datum, Aktenzeichen und verifizierbarer Quelle verwendet.

entry.title: bav-strategie-konzern
entry.content: Strategische Beratung zur betrieblichen Altersversorgung in Konzernen: Pensionsmodelle alle fuenf Durchführungswege CTA Pension Buyouts Drei-Stufen-Theorie Versorgungssystem-Harmonisierung internationale Benefits Restrukturierung DB-zu-DC im Duesseldorfer Boutique-Stil.

entry.title: bereicherungs-und-anfechtungsrecht-pruefer
entry.content: Mechanisches Durchprüfen von Bereicherungsrecht §§ 812 ff. BGB, AnfG und Insolvenzanfechtung §§ 129-147 InsO. Mit KI-Screening von Schuldnerakten, § 135 Gesellschafterdarlehen, Bargeschäft § 142 und Verteidigung des Anfechtungsgegners. Keine Rechtsberatung.

entry.title: quandora-staging
entry.content: Staging Quandora plugin with Factor Mining and Strategy skills for pre-release workflow testing.

entry.title: watch-local
entry.content: Let Claude watch a video -- fully local. Downloads with yt-dlp, extracts auto-scaled frames with ffmpeg, ALWAYS transcribes with faster-whisper and compares against creator-provided captions. Auto-detects your NVIDIA GPU: uses it for video decode (NVDEC) and whisper when present, falls back to a fully working CPU-only mode when not. Self-provisioned portable runtime -- no Docker, no system installs, delete one folder to remove everything. Supports URLs, local files, and SMB/UNC paths. No cloud API keys.

entry.title: wibaek-review
entry.content: Engineering Review Workflows for Code, Architecture, and System Design

entry.title: berufsgerichtliche-verfahren-freie-berufe
entry.content: Plugin für anwaltsgerichtliche und berufsgerichtliche Verfahren gegen Anwälte, Patentanwälte, Steuerberater, Wirtschaftsprüfer und Notare: Kammeraufsicht, Rüge, Disziplinarverfahren, Zulassung, Vermögensverfall, beA, Werbung, Sachlichkeit und Rechtsmittel.

entry.title: aufsichtsrat-ag-se-praxis
entry.content: Praxisplugin für Aufsichtsräte in AG und SE: Überwachung, Informationsrechte, Vorstand bestellen/abberufen, Vergütung, Ausschüsse, Protokoll, Business Judgment, Haftungsvermeidung, Börse, SE und Mitbestimmung.

entry.title: bank-rechtsabteilung
entry.content: Rechtsabteilung einer mittelgroßen deutschen Bank: Aufsicht, Kredit, Avale, Bürgschaft, Garantien, Trade Finance, ZAG/PSD2, PSD3/PSR-Vorschau, eWpG, MiCAR, Tokenisierung, BaFin, Vorstand, HV und Kanzleisteuerung.

entry.title: arbeitszeugnispruefer
entry.content: Prueft bestehende deutsche Arbeitszeugnisse Schritt fuer Schritt: Notenstufen, Zufriedenheits- und Verhaltensformeln, Geheimcodes, Auslassungen, Steigerungsadverbien, Schlussformel. Liefert Ampel-Einschaetzung pro Satz, Gesamtnote, Aufforderungsschreiben oder Klagestrategie zur Berichtigung.

entry.title: berichtspflichten-erlediger
entry.content: Berichtspflichten-Erlediger für mittelständische Unternehmen: amtliche Statistik, Portale, Umwelt-, Produkt-, Steuer-, Sozial-, Lieferketten-, Datenschutz- und Aufsichtsmeldungen mit Fristenboard, Datenquellen, Plausibilitätscheck und Behördenkommunikation.

entry.title: arbeitszeugnis-analyse
entry.content: Analyse deutscher Arbeitszeugnisse nach Ampelsystem. Prüft Geheimcodes, Schaufenster-Drift, negative Codeworte, Steigerungsadverbien, Satznoten und Gesamtnotenspanne. Führt vom Erstgespräch über Mandantenbericht und Aufforderungsschreiben bis zur Klagestrategie.

entry.title: bautraegervertrag-pruefer
entry.content: Bauträgervertrag-Prüfer aus Verbrauchersicht: MaBV, §§ 650u/650v BGB, § 650m Abs. 2 BGB, AGB, Baubeschreibung, Abnahme, Schlussrate, WEG, Vormerkung, Lastenfreistellung und Drei-Dokumente-Ausgabe.

entry.title: arbeitszeugnisgenerator
entry.content: Erstellt deutsche Arbeitszeugnisse Schritt fuer Schritt: Rolle, Stammdaten, Taetigkeiten, Leistungs- und Verhaltensbewertung, Notenwahl per Ampelsystem, Schlussformeln. Wahlweise vorgegebene Note oder gefuehrte Einschaetzung. Mehrere Harnesses: qualifiziert, einfach, Ausbildung.

entry.title: apothekenrecht
entry.content: Super-Plugin für Apothekenrecht: Betriebserlaubnis, ApBetrO, Versand, E-Rezept, BtM, Retaxation, Aufsicht und Compliance.

entry.title: atlas
entry.content: Multi-agent coding architect with automatic self-improvement. 21 plainly named skills: the atlas-orchestrate engine, atlas-audit (code/security audit, architecture map, atlas self-telemetry), atlas-setup (onboarding, install, connectors, repair - the one manual skill), atlas-loop (recurring/iterative work), atlas-ux-test (UX runtime swarm), and 16 task skills (atlas-feature, atlas-debug, atlas-refactor, atlas-frontend, atlas-component, atlas-db-audit, atlas-gitignore, atlas-handoff, atlas-harden, atlas-launch, atlas-m365, atlas-prompt, atlas-readme, atlas-validate, atlas-vendor-assessment, atlas-wiki). 12 core agents, 10 hooks (session boot, prompt optimizer, bash advisor, format-after-edit, dispatch tripwire, completion gate, memory capture, auto-skill, self-improvement nudge, session-transcript ingest), and the atlas-orchestrate method: independent verification with runtime evidence before any done claim. Self-improvement: persistent memory at ~/.atlas/memory/, automatic skill creation from session transcripts at ~/.atlas/skills/, skill lifecycle curation, and context optimization that disables unused skills/agents. Org deployment (11 departments) lives in the separate armada plugin.

entry.title: aktienrecht-hauptversammlung-ag-se
entry.content: Hauptversammlungs-Vorbereiter, Leitfaden-Ersteller und Durchführungsplugin für kleine AG, normale AG, börsennotierte AG und SE: Einberufung, Tagesordnung, virtuelle HV, Q&A, Abstimmung, Niederschrift, Anfechtungsrisiko und Post-HV.

entry.title: barrierefreiheit-web-checker
entry.content: Web-Barrierefreiheits-Checker für BFSG, BFSGV, BITV 2.0, EN 301 549 und WCAG: Scope, Audit, Tastatur, Screenreader, Formulare, PDFs, Erklärung, Roadmap und Abnahme.

entry.title: aussenwirtschaft-zoll-sanktionen
entry.content: Freistehendes Plugin für Außenwirtschaft, Sanktionen, Zoll, Exportkontrolle, BAFA, TARIC, CBAM, Verbrauchsteuer, AWV, AML/KYC und Ermittlungen.

entry.title: multiplai-media
entry.content: Media skill pack: audio transcription, YouTube transcripts, screen-recording demo videos, diagrams, host-browser automation.

entry.title: multiplai-dev
entry.content: Developer skill pack: spec-driven builds, executable plan authoring, code/security review, refactoring, walkthroughs, e2e tests, cloud ops, skill authoring.

entry.title: aktenauszug-gerichtsverfahren
entry.content: Strukturierter Aktenauszug für deutsche Gerichtsverfahren: Verfahrensidentifikation Einleitungssatz Verfahrenszusammenfassung Sachverhaltschronologie Verfahrensgeschichte tabellarische Gegenüberstellung der Parteivortraege Beweismittel und Rechtsargumente für schnelle Einarbeitung in Akten.

entry.title: aktenaufbereiter-strafrecht
entry.content: Aktenaufbereiter für die Strafverteidigung. Sechs Excel-fähige Übersichten — Aktenvorblatt; Personenverzeichnis; Tatkomplexe; Beziehungen; Chronologie; Fristen. Fortlaufend ergaenzbar. Erkennt Luecken und Widersprueche. Kein Ersatz für Aktenlektuere.

entry.title: bgsd
entry.content: Model-agnostic conductor for subscription-backed Claude and Codex GSD pipelines.
